name: Our Mother the Fragrance of Paradise
overview: Fatima a mother of seven children, loses her memory at 1983, for thirty years, when she regains her memory she finds out that she don't know her children's whereabouts she sets out to find them with all her power willing to be reunited with them once again and this time forever.

trailers.title: برومو مسلسل امنا رويحة الجنة ( رمضان 2015 )
